overrides.expect: (A _ {k}) _ {v v ^ {\prime}} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 0, & \text {if for some 1\leq i\leq k - 2 , we have \varepsilon_{i + 1} = 1 ,} \\ & \text {and \varepsilon^{\prime}_{i} = 0 ,} \\ F _ {i _ {1}} * \dots * F _ {i _ {r}}, & \text {otherwise, where \{i_{1},\ldots,i_{r} \} = \{i: \varepsilon_{k - i + 1} = 0 and} \\ & \varepsilon_ {k - i} ^ {\prime} = 1 \}, \text {and where we set \varepsilon_{k} = 0 , \varepsilon^{\prime}_{0} = 1 , and an} \\ & \text {empty Hadamard product equal to J = x / (1 - x) .} \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: (A_{k})_{v v^{\prime}} = \left\{ \begin{array}{ll} 0, & \text{if for some } 1\leq i\leq k-2, \text{ we have } \varepsilon_{i+1}=1, \\ & \text{and } \varepsilon^{\prime}_{i}=0, \\ F_{i_{1}} * \dots * F_{i_{r}}, & \text{otherwise, where } \{i_{1},\ldots,i_{r}\} = \{i: \varepsilon_{k-i+1}=0 \text{ and} \\ & \varepsilon_{k-i}^{\prime}=1\}, \text{ and where we set } \varepsilon_{k}=0, \varepsilon^{\prime}_{0}=1, \text{ and an} \\ & \text{empty Hadamard product equal to } J=x/(1-x). \end{array} \right.
